CREATE TABLE test_table AS SELECT * FROM rdf_geo_fill();
SELECT * FROM <http://example.org/graph1> WHERE ?s <geo:lat> ?lat AND ?s <geo:long> ?long ORDER BY ?lat, ?long;
CREATE TABLE geometry_table AS SELECT ?s, ?g WHERE { ?s <geo:lat> ?lat . ?s <geo:long> ?long . BIND(rdf_geo_fill() AS ?g) } GROUP BY ?s, ?g;

WITH { SELECT ?s (COUNT(?lat) AS ?latCount) WHERE { ?s <geo:lat> ?lat } GROUP BY ?s } AS lat_counts, { SELECT ?s (COUNT(?long) AS ?longCount) WHERE { ?s <geo:long> ?long } GROUP BY ?s } AS long_counts SELECT lat_counts.s FROM lat_counts JOIN long_counts ON lat_counts.s = long_counts.s WHERE lat_counts.latCount > 1;
